response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with roughly 18 years of hands-on experience, meeting the tenure minimum, and shows entrepreneurial drive as a founder. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI products or platforms; the candidate's AI exposure is recent and limited to agent tooling contributions, with no evidence of strategic leadership, advising executives or customers, or operating at principal/director scope.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated director/principal-level scope; career has been senior/staff IC delivery roles
Limited depth in AI/ML — no advanced degree, publications, or recognized AI products at scale
No evidence of strategic advisory work with executives, customers, or partners

key_factors.factor: Long, versatile engineering tenure with founder experience
